channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Read the transcript of Trump's interview on The Axios Show
item.description: Axios' Marc Caputo welcomed President Trump to the show, noting they aimed for a conversational format.

item.title: Trump suggests Cuba intervention would be simpler than Iran
item.description: President Trump said on "The Axios Show" that a potential Cuba invasion might resemble the swift capture of Venezuelan Pres...

item.title: Exclusive: Trump tells "The Axios Show" Anthropic was a national security threat
item.description: President Trump said he viewed Anthropic as a national security threat in an exclusive interview for "The Axios Show...

item.title: Watch the extended Trump interview on "The Axios Show"
item.description: President Trump joins Axios' Marc Caputo on the latest episode of "The Axios Show." Speaking from the Roosevelt Room, Trump sounds ...
